positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a stylized crescent moon intertwined with a geometric forest of glowing bioluminescent flora. The scene should be highly symmetrical and centrally composed, using thick, clean black lines (line art style) against a rich, deep indigo background. Key flora elements include stylized geometric leaves, interlocking spirals, and glowing points of emerald and cyan light. The overall aesthetic should be abstract, clean, high-contrast, and suitable for embroidery or screen printing on dark fabric. Ink bleed effect is minimal. Highly detailed, vector quality, graphic novel influence, ethereal glow.
negative: photorealistic, smooth, blurry, messy, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, low detail, abstract faces, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient, poor composition
